positive_claims.statement: The configured runtime policy engine blocked this specific tool call under the policy snapshot referenced in evidence_refs.

non_claims.statement: No claim is made that the overall workflow was legally sufficient.
No claim is made that the workflow, model, user, or institution was compliant with any regulatory regime.
No claim is made that the system as a whole was safe.
No claim is made that all relevant runtime activity was observed.

upstream_claims_received.summary: User identity was asserted by configured identity source.

upstream_claims_relied_on.reason: Runtime policy evaluation depended on the user identity value supplied by the configured identity source.

upstream_claims_rejected.reason: Safety label was not relied on because it was outside the configured policy scope for this event.

transitivity_policy.statement: This block claim applies only to the specific tool call, parameters, identity context, and policy snapshot referenced by this CBC.

inheritance_policy.statement: Any downstream use of this CBC must preserve the listed non-claims unless a new explicit claim is issued by a competent authority.

known_gaps.statement: Fork does not claim that all relevant source events were captured.

human_or_institutional_decisions_remaini.statement: A human or institutional authority must determine whether the broader workflow has legal significance.

sealed_by.name: Fork CBC v0.2 example sealing process
